summary: The diff implements the three required features (REQ-11, REQ-12, REQ-13) with good coverage. Live Mode toggle, polling, symbol selector, ticker strip, status indicator, error handling with toast, and timeframe mapping are all present. Nearly all acceptance criteria are met. One minor gap: the AC requiring the ticker to be hidden or show a placeholder when Live Mode is disabled is technically met (component returns null) but no explicit placeholder is shown. Overall implementation is solid and comprehensive.

hallucinated_features.description: 24h volume is displayed in the LivePriceTicker component (Vol: field), which was not requested in REQ-13's acceptance criteria.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-13 specifies only: symbol name, last price, 24h change %, 24h high, and 24h low. The volume field was added beyond the spec.

hallucinated_features.description: Additional trading symbols beyond the required 5 (DOGEUSDT and ADAUSDT) are included in the LiveSymbolSelector preset list.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-12 specifies at least BTCUSDT, ETHUSDT, BNBUSDT, SOLUSDT, XRPUSDT. Adding DOGEUSDT and ADAUSDT goes beyond the specified list.
